description: Every team agent self-sleeps from Idle while a task stays Open, and the meta parks a judgment directive in the yield-forever orchestrator's queue: quiescent-but-unfinished, so the liveness watchdog must fire despite the pending directive (#28).
reproduces: quiescent-but-unfinished / the liveness watchdog, with a pending judgment directive (ADR 0015/0023, #28)
